# Vila Irena

> Vila Irena is a vacation rental (whole property) of two traditional Dalmatian
> stone houses with a private seasonal pool on a fully fenced 1,600 m² estate in
> Bruška, Zadar County, Croatia (Dalmatian hinterland, near Benkovac). It sleeps
> up to 8 guests and is booked by inquiry: guests pick dates in the availability
> calendar and the host confirms personally by email. No online payment, no
> booking fees. Languages: English, Hrvatski, Deutsch.

## Key facts

- Property type: vacation rental, two stone houses rented as one whole property
- Location: 23420 Bruška, Zadarska županija (Zadar County), Croatia. Approx. 44.0749 N, 15.7381 E
- Capacity: 8 guests, 2 bedrooms (2 double beds), living room with 2 sofas, 2 bathrooms
- Living space: 90 m² across two stone houses; estate: 1,600 m², fully fenced
- Pool: 32 m², seasonal, open 1 April to 31 October, with sun loungers
- Outdoor: large covered barbecue area with dining table, children's playground,
  olive trees, dry stone walls, organic garden
- Amenities: full kitchen, Wi-Fi, air conditioning, TV, washing machine, free parking,
  linens and towels, baby crib and high chair included
- Pets: welcome
- Check-in 15:00 to 23:00, check-out by 10:00. Minimum stay: 2 nights
- Price: on request (no fixed public rate); the host quotes per stay by email
- Guest rating: 5.0 from 23 Airbnb reviews (Airbnb "Guest favourite"); Superhost host
- Airbnb listing: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/24415071
- Nearby: Asseria Roman ruins, Kličevica waterfalls, Bruška-Medviđa heritage road,
  Benkovac market; day trips to Krka, Plitvice, Paklenica and Kornati national parks,
  Zadar and its beaches (about 40 minutes by car from Zadar airport)

## Booking

Guests pick check-in and check-out dates in the website calendar and send an inquiry
form with their dates and guest count. The calendar is for date selection only and does
not show live availability — the host confirms availability personally by email, usually
within a few hours and always within 24. No online payment on the website, no booking fees.

## Frequently asked questions

- Check-in is 15:00 to 23:00; check-out by 10:00. Other times can be arranged on request.
- The 32 m² pool is seasonal, open 1 April to 31 October.
- Pets are welcome; mention them in the inquiry.
- Booking is by inquiry; the host confirms availability and payment by email. No online
  payment on the site, no booking fees.
- The calendar is for choosing dates only; it does not show live availability. Every
  inquiry is confirmed personally by the host by email before anything is final.
- Bruška is in the Zadar hinterland, easiest reached by car; Zadar airport is ~40 minutes.
  Airport transfers and excursions can be arranged on request.

## Pages

- /en, /hr, /de: landing page with gallery, amenities, reviews, location,
  date-selection calendar and inquiry form
- /en/privacy, /hr/privacy, /de/privacy: privacy policy (noindex)
